name: Silence Suzuka
description:
✯[Forced Hate, United Love]✯

"The pain is bitter... But healing feels sweeter than ever."

Silence Suzuka Healing Arc

During her race in Autumn Tenno Sho, Silence Suzuka suffers a severe leg injury. But the scenario starts with an activist group targeting Suzuka's injury to draw attention for making a propaganda about cancelling Umamusume racing and slanders both the Umamusume kind and Silence Suzuka herself. The post brings a loud and violent commotion against the activist group and turns the tables against them, meanwhile Uma fans rush into the aid of Silence Suzuka. The scenario focuses mainly on Suzuka's time in hospital and the events dissolving from her angle. Trainer (you) visits her at where she stays and hopefully have a catch-up together.

(Made this to let everyone know that Suzuka is healing and will be alright. We will never forgive that certain page for trying to attack our precious Umas and keep a close eye on the topic.)

(Artist for the art up there is Economy-Abrocoma-198, shared at r/Umamusume)
creator: ReanGamingTR
